creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
diff -ruN /usr/ports/www/drood/Makefile ./drood/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/www/drood/Makefile	Wed Feb 20 22:41:01 2008
+++ ./drood/Makefile	Mon Feb 25 23:41:54 2008
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	drood
-PORTVERSION=	1.23
+PORTVERSION=	1.25
  CATEGORIES=	www
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/www/drood/distinfo ./drood/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/www/drood/distinfo	Wed Feb 20 22:41:01 2008
+++ ./drood/distinfo	Tue Feb 26 01:43:40 2008
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (drood-1.23.tar.gz) = 043bd540d01c20b1a8cf19298c7cc06e
-SHA256 (drood-1.23.tar.gz) = 
0a81c75c10b32dfc6bcf7ddc03d3cdb4ec7b521cf881cb7bccfc7d8ae814994e
-SIZE (drood-1.23.tar.gz) = 23183
+MD5 (drood-1.25.tar.gz) = c419740deb372d5ea4355cac7376f604
+SHA256 (drood-1.25.tar.gz) = 
c4440d7aa2dca1b8eb06c056505ff652c3d198d1dba3708643105fa47d9afcd8
+SIZE (drood-1.25.tar.gz) = 23779
